name: Public Joint Stock Company Rosseti Volga
summary: Public Joint Stock Company Rosseti Volga transmits and distributes electric power in Russia. It is involved in the technological connection to electric grids. It offers hotel accommodation, sanatorium, and resort, as well as medical treatment and prophylactic services; produces and trades in foodstuff; organizes public catering; and engages in trading, intermediary, sale, and marketing operations. It maintains working capacity of electric and thermal networks; undertakes design, and civil and knot works of the accounts of electric power, and hot and cold water supply; designs, installs, and adjusts the knots of the accounts of heat, gas, and process equipment; installs and adjusts process equipment, boiler installations, and auxiliaries; installs and adjusts instrumentations and units fuel consuming units; organizes and carries out power audit; and engages in the civil repair works, assembly, specialized works on installation of systems of gas supply, and service of objects. It provides medical, advisory, expert, tourist, informational, organizational, and administrative services; conducts prophylactic, sanitary, and informational works; and offers institution's employee protection services, as well as organizes active rest and cultural leisure for patients, recreation events, physical training, sports, tourist, children's recreational camps, and other mass events. It also transports passengers by motor transport and cars, as well as cargoes by motor transport; rents motor transport, agricultural and construction machinery, and equipment to individuals and legal entities; and maintains and repairs motor vehicles. The company was formerly known as Interregional Distribution Grid Company of Volga, Public Joint-Stock Company and changed its name to Public Joint Stock Company Rosseti Volga in August 2020. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Saratov, Russia. Public Joint Stock Company Rosseti Volga is a subsidiary of Rosseti, Public Joint Stock Company.
